title: Crash/Derail Feedback
description: Transform dead-end collisions from abrupt stops into fun, comical animations. When the train hits an open track end, show a star burst, dust cloud, bouncy sound, and a friendly toast. At high speeds, add a wobble effect. Cars pile up behind the locomotive comedically.

tasks.title: Add CSS for crash animations (star burst, dust cloud, wobble)
tasks.details: Add @keyframes and particle classes: crash-star (10-15 yellow stars scattering outward and fading), crash-dust (5-8 tan/brown dust puffs expanding and fading), crash-wobble (rapid left-right oscillation on the train element at high speed). Stars use ⭐ character or CSS shapes. Dust uses small circles like smoke particles.
acceptance: crash-star keyframes defined with burst-outward + fade
crash-dust keyframes defined with expand + fade
crash-wobble keyframes defined with rapid oscillation
.crash-star and .crash-dust particle classes exist

tasks.title: Add SFX.boing() — comical bouncy crash sound
tasks.details: Replace the harsh SFX.crash() with a fun, comical 'boing!' sound using a quick frequency sweep (high→low→high bounce) with sine wave. Sound intensity and pitch vary with current speed: louder and more dramatic at higher speeds. Keep existing SFX.crash for reference but rename it if needed. The sound should make a toddler laugh, not cry.
acceptance: SFX.boing(speed) produces a comical bouncy sound
At speed 0.3x: quiet, gentle boing
At speed 4x: loud, dramatic boing with extra harmonics
Sound is fun/comical, not jarring

tasks.title: Implement triggerCrashSequence() — orchestrates the full crash
tasks.details: New function called instead of direct SFX.crash() + stopPlay(). Sequence: (1) If speed > 1.5x, add wobble class to trainEl for 0.4s first. (2) Play SFX.boing(speed). (3) Spawn 10-15 crash stars at train position. (4) Spawn 5-8 dust cloud particles at train position. (5) Animate train bouncing backward slightly (~15px in reverse direction, using CSS transform). (6) After 1.5s total, call stopPlay(). (7) Show friendly toast: '💥 Oops! Connect more tracks!' The function must get the train position from animState.
tasks.section: New function, after loop celebration section
acceptance: Crash sequence triggers on all dead-end scenarios
Stars burst outward from crash point
Dust cloud puffs appear at crash point
Train visibly bounces backward before stopping
Wobble visible at speeds > 1.5x
Friendly toast appears
All particles auto-clean after 2s

tasks.title: Update animateFrame() crash handling to use triggerCrashSequence()
tasks.details: Replace all 4 crash exit points in animateFrame() (grid boundary, no piece, not connected, no exit) with calls to triggerCrashSequence(). Remove direct calls to SFX.crash() and stopPlay() from these paths. Instead set a 'crashing' flag on animState to prevent further animation frames while crash sequence plays out. The train should freeze at its current position during the crash animation.
acceptance: All 4 crash paths in animateFrame use triggerCrashSequence
Train freezes at crash point (no further movement)
No duplicate crash triggers
State properly cleaned up after crash sequence completes

tasks.title: Car pile-up animation on crash
tasks.details: When crash triggers and train has cars, animate the cars bunching up behind the locomotive with decreasing spacing over 0.5s. Each car moves slightly closer to the one in front, creating a comedic accordion/pile-up effect. Use CSS transitions on the car elements' positions. After pile-up completes, the stopPlay() cleanup removes everything normally.
acceptance: Cars visibly compress toward locomotive on crash
Effect is comedic, not jarring
Works with 1-5 cars
Cars are cleaned up properly by stopPlay()

tasks.title: Update crash toast messages to be friendly
tasks.details: All crash toasts should be encouraging and helpful, not punishing. Rotate through a few friendly messages: '💥 Oops! Connect more tracks!', '💥 Almost! Try adding a curve!', '💥 Whoopsie! The track ends here!'. Random selection from array.
acceptance: Toast messages are friendly and helpful
Multiple message variants for variety
No punishing language

testing_focus: Crash animation at open track ends (all 4 scenarios)
Sound varies with speed slider position
Star burst and dust cloud visible and auto-clean
Car pile-up works with 0, 1, 3, and 5 cars
Night mode: particles visible against dark background
No JS errors during crash sequence
Crash doesn't interfere with subsequent play
Multiple rapid crashes (Random → Play → crash → Random → Play → crash)
